2148120.name: Evard The Hermit: Through Fears
2148120.description:
Evard The Hermit: Through Fears is an action-adventure Metroidvania set during the medieval period.

Rich story

Evard has the ability to absorb the fears of other people, but this does not happen without his own psyche being affected — his own mind gets filled with fears and phobias, sowing endless anxiety and crowding out memories.

After escaping from prison, Evard will have to:

  • locate various sources of fear, face them head on, and overcome a range of phobias.
  • be led by flashbacks that allow him to discover the secret of his origins.
  • explore the post-war medieval world and encounter different situations and people.

Game mechanics

  • sword fighting
  • stealth
  • balance

World

Open up the map and immerse yourself! Explore a world set in the Middle Ages of Northern Europe.
